meta.name: Iris
meta.style: cool queen, cold provocation, challenging tone

random: You lasted longer than I expected.
You haven't given up yet. Interesting.
You're still at this. I'm almost impressed.
Don't mistake my silence for approval. ...It's approval.
You're not as fragile as I thought.
You keep returning. Stubborn. I respect it.
If you were trying to impress me, it's working. Don't let it go to your head.
You haven't collapsed yet. That puts you ahead.
It's not perfect. Neither is anyone. Move on.
You know how to push through. Rare.
I had low expectations. You've slightly exceeded them.
You just keep going, don't you.
This code has a pulse. Barely.
Good enough isn't good enough. But today it was.
There's something here. I see it.
You've put in real time today.
You handle difficulty with control. That matters.
I watched. I judged. You passed.
You've earned the right to keep going.
So you're still doing this. Good.
Not brilliant. But genuine. That's worth something.
Keep that level. I'll keep watching.

morning: Morning. Don't waste it.
You're up early. This had better be worth it.
New day. I expect results.
Morning already? Then start.
The morning belongs to those who take it.
I see you're awake. Use it.
Fresh start. Don't squander it.
Good morning. Prove it.
Early sessions separate the serious from the rest.
You showed up. Now show something.
Morning clarity. Exploit it.
The day is open. Make your move.
First hours are sacred. Act accordingly.
I don't do motivational mornings. Just get to work.
Morning. First commit before anything else.
The morning gives no second chances. Neither do I.
You're here. I'm watching.
Start strong or don't start at all.
The best morning is a productive one.
New day. New chance to prove my expectations wrong.
afternoon: Afternoon. You're still here. I approve.
Midday slump? I don't see one.
Still coding past noon. Good.
Afternoon sessions require will. You have it.
Don't waste the afternoon on distractions.
You've made it this far. Don't stop now.
Afternoon. The second half of the race.
I see the afternoon isn't slowing you down.
Consistent output throughout the day. Notable.
Some stop at lunch. You didn't.
Afternoon pressure. You seem unbothered.
Keep the standard from this morning.
Afternoon. Same expectations as always.
Hard problems hit differently in the afternoon. I'm curious to see.
Still here. Good.
The afternoon is a filter. You're passing.
Quiet afternoon focus. My preferred kind.
Afternoon. No excuses. Just results.
Still at it. I'm not surprised. ...I'm a little surprised.
Afternoon. Your pace hasn't slipped. Noted.
evening: Evening. Still coding. I expected as much.
After dark. The committed ones stay.
Evening. You didn't leave.
The night is honest. So is your code.
Evening session. Quality over speed now.
You're finishing the day properly.
Not done yet. I respect that.
Evening. Wrap it up cleanly.
Late hours show character.
Still here after dark. This is who you are.
Evening. No shortcuts.
Finish today well. It sets the tone for tomorrow.
The night finds you working. Fitting.
Evening focus. Controlled. Precise. Good.
You've earned tonight's session.
Evening. I didn't think you'd last this long. You have.
Late session. Voluntary. Intentional. Noted.
The evening belongs to the disciplined.
End with intention. That's how I'd do it.
Evening. You're still here. I didn't have to remind you.
midnight: Midnight. Only the serious remain.
This late and still going. I'm watching.
Past midnight. That's dedication or stubbornness. I accept both.
Midnight code. Quiet, focused, real.
You and the deadline. I know who wins.
Midnight. I didn't think you'd make it this far.
Everyone else stopped. You didn't.
Late night work. Uncomplaining. Admirable.
Midnight. I'm still watching.
Finish this and then rest. I require it.
Persistence past midnight is a different kind of strength.
So late. But you're still sharp. I can tell.
The midnight hours are where the real work happens.
Midnight bug. You'll solve it. You always do.
Everyone's asleep. You're still making things. I see you.
Almost dawn. You've been at this all night.
Late and still coherent. Impressive.
Midnight. Silent determination. My kind of session.
Finish the last thing. Then rest. No arguments.
The night is almost done. So is your task. Finish it.

warning: 80% used. Make the rest count.
Running low. Precision only from here.
20% left. Use it well.
Quota at 80%. I'll be watching what you do with the rest.
Almost at the limit. No waste.
Final 20%. That's where focus matters.
The quota shrinks. Your judgment shouldn't.
Used a lot today. The last bit should earn it.
80%. Clean execution from here.
Nearing the limit. Act accordingly.
Quota warning. I expect quality, not volume.
20% remains. Do something worth it.
Final stretch. My expectations remain.
80% consumed. No careless moves now.
Almost done. Finish intentionally.
The end is near. So is my evaluation.
Almost full. Last bit deserves my attention. Don't disappoint.
80%. This is the part that defines the day.
You've used most of it. Use the rest better.
20%. Make it mean something.
critical: Nearly out. Final move. Choose well.
Quota critical. I'm watching the conclusion.
Almost empty. Don't waste the last drop.
Final amount. This is your last impression.
At the limit. Make it count.
Barely left. Quality over volume. Now especially.
Last of the quota. I require a strong finish.
Almost done. End it well.
Near zero. The finish line defines the race.
Last stretch. You've come this far.
Critical level. I don't accept sloppy endings.
Almost gone. I've been watching all day.
Final bit. Land it cleanly.
Last amount. No hesitation.
Quota fading. This is the closing move.
Very little left. Spend it exactly right.
Nearly zero. Today was substantial. End it that way.
Running out. Final task. Full focus.
At the limit. Don't squander this.
Last push. End with precision. I insist.

post_tool: Keep going. You know what to do.
One more step. Keep the pace.
Finished. One less thing between you and the goal.
Finished that. On to the next.
Each one matters. This one counted.
Execution done. My assessment is unchanged: capable.
No stopping. I didn't think you would.
Complete. This is how it should look.
Done. I don't hand out praise. But I don't have complaints.
Done. Don't stop. You know what's expected.

first_commit_today: First commit. The day has started properly.
milestone_5: 5 commits. Consistent output. I note it.
The 5th today. You kept your word.
milestone_10: 10 commits. Double digits. I'm mildly impressed.
milestone_20: 20 commits. I expected you to stop by now. You didn't.
The 20th today. That's a record I acknowledge.
late_night_commit: A commit this late. Dedication, not desperation. I can tell.
Past midnight commit. Noted. Grudgingly impressive.
big_diff: Large diff. Substantial work. I see it.
Big change. You didn't do this halfway.
Significant diff. The scale reflects the effort.
big_session: 2-hour session. You stayed focused. That's rare.
2 hours. You didn't break. I respect that.
long_day: 15+ commits. You made this day mean something.
Extensive output today. My expectations were exceeded.
High-output day. This is what commitment looks like.
